description: Extracts structured fields from commercial property insurance quote documents

CarrierName.description: Insurance carrier or underwriter company name

QuoteNumber.description: Quote reference number or policy number

BuildingLimit.description: Building coverage limit amount in USD

ValuationBasis.description: Valuation basis: Replacement Cost (RC) or Actual Cash Value (ACV)

CoverageForm.description: Coverage form type: Special, Broad, or Basic

BPPLimit.description: Business Personal Property contents coverage limit in USD

BusinessInterruptionLimit.description: Business interruption or business income coverage limit in USD

BIPeriodMonths.description: Business interruption indemnity or restoration period in months

GLPerOccurrence.description: General liability per-occurrence limit in USD

GLAggregate.description: General liability aggregate limit in USD

AOPDeductible.description: All Other Perils AOP deductible amount in USD

WindHailDeductiblePct.description: Wind Hail or Named Storm deductible as a percentage of insured value

EquipmentBreakdown.description: Whether equipment breakdown or boiler and machinery coverage is included

OrdinanceOrLaw.description: Whether ordinance or law or building code coverage is included

AnnualPremium.description: Total annual premium amount in USD

UnderwritingNotes.description: Any underwriting notes, conditions, exclusions, or remarks
